title: CASE WHEN Ifadesi
subtitle: Kosullu degerler ve kategorize etme.
code:
CREATE TABLE students (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    age INTEGER,
    grade REAL
);

INSERT INTO students (name, age, grade) VALUES
    ('Ahmet Yilmaz', 20, 85.50),
    ('Ayse Kaya', 21, 92.00),
    ('Mehmet Demir', 22, 67.25),
    ('Zeynep Sahin', 19, 78.75),
    ('Can Ozturk', 23, 55.00);

-- Notlari harf notuna cevirme
SELECT
    name,
    grade,
    CASE
        WHEN grade >= 90 THEN 'AA'
        WHEN grade >= 70 THEN 'BA'
        WHEN grade >= 50 THEN 'CC'
        ELSE 'FF'
    END AS letter_grade
FROM students;

-- Gecti/kaldi durumu
SELECT
    name,
    grade,
    CASE
        WHEN grade >= 60 THEN 'Gecti'
        ELSE 'Kaldi'
    END AS status
FROM students;

-- Yas grubuna gore kategori
SELECT
    name,
    age,
    CASE
        WHEN age < 20 THEN 'Genc'
        WHEN age BETWEEN 20 AND 22 THEN 'Orta'
        ELSE 'Buyuk'
    END AS age_group
FROM students;

-- CASE ile siralama
SELECT name, grade
FROM students
ORDER BY
    CASE
        WHEN grade >= 90 THEN 1
        WHEN grade >= 70 THEN 2
        ELSE 3
    END;

-- Gecen/kalan sayisi (gruplama ile)
SELECT
    CASE WHEN grade >= 60 THEN 'Gecti' ELSE 'Kaldi' END AS status,
    COUNT(*) AS count
FROM students
GROUP BY status;
